title: caryophyllata rivalis
intro: Caryophyllata rivalis, also known as sweet woodruff, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to soothe and calm the digestive system and reduce stress. The health benefits of sweet woodruff include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety and insomnia, and act as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of sweet woodruff can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
